name: fin_recurring
title: Recurring Journals
description: Recurring journal templates: a JSON line template plus a schedule (frequency/next_run/last_run) and an auto_post flag. Reconciled against a private predecessor-system audit, not part of this repo (its RecurringJournal model: 'JSON template + frequency + auto_post', materialized by a daily scheduled task). This package carries the fields only -- the materialization job itself (reading due templates and creating real fin_journals/fin_journal_lines rows) is a daemon-pass concern and is NOT built here; see dbbasic-package.json's Deferred list. next_run/last_run are therefore plain owner-writable fields, not stamped by anything in this package yet.

fields.name: template_lines
fields.label: Template Lines (JSON)
fields.help: The recurring line template as JSON (account/debit/credit/memo shapes), per the predecessor system's RecurringJournal.template field. Stored as opaque text -- this package does not parse or validate its structure, since nothing here materializes it yet.

fields.name: next_run
fields.label: Next Run
fields.help: When the materialization job would next create a journal from this template. No job reads or writes this field yet in this package -- see the module description's Deferred note.

fields.name: last_run
fields.label: Last Run
fields.help: When the materialization job last created a journal from this template. No job reads or writes this field yet in this package -- see the module description's Deferred note.

fields.name: auto_post
fields.label: Auto-post
fields.help: Whether a materialized journal should be posted immediately rather than left in draft. Carried as a plain flag; has no effect until the materialization job exists.
